name: codex-dev-orchestrator
description: Autonomous evidence-led delivery with research, brainstorming, typed recovery, review, and safety gates.

interface.shortDescription: Research, plan, deliver, and recover autonomously
interface.longDescription: A durable Codex delivery workflow with repository and live-web research, interactive brainstorming, detailed task decomposition, typed autonomous recovery, writer leases, independent review, browser QA, and narrow human safety gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Dev Orchestrator to plan and deliver this change.
